title: Gate
purpose: Allow context through when valid is true.

configFields.description: block = stop downstream when valid is false; pass = always pass but preserve valid/errors.
Optional message to display/log when blocking.
Node output caching. auto = reuse when safe, force = always reuse, disabled = recompute each run.
If true, wait until all connected input ports have values before executing the node.

semanticNodeExample.title: Gate
semanticNodeExample.description: Allow context through when valid is true.
